title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (8) لسنة 1983 بتعديل بعض أحكام المرسوم بقانون رقم (6) لسنة 1977 الخاص بالموازين والمكاييل
title_en: Decree No. (7) of 1983 approving the Loan Convention to Contribute to the Financing of the Sixth Joint Arab Telecommunications Project between the Government of the State of Bahrain and the Arab Fund for Economic and Social Development
